ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the application was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "git_commit_hash" TEXT /* Git commit hash for version control */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the application is running */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the run was last updated */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the run is executed */,
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific GPU used for the run */,
  "system_info" TEXT /* System information (e.g., OS, CPU, RAM) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user is part of */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in the version */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "exported_data" TEXT /* Exported data in a serialized format (e.g., JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
